title: GetParametersForImportInput
description: GetParametersForImportInput schema from Amazon Payment Cryptography

allOf.description: The key block format type such as TR-34 or TR-31 to use during key material import. Import token is only required for TR-34 key import TR34_KEY_BLOCK. Import token is not required for TR-31 key import.

The wrapping key algorithm to generate a wrapping key certificate. This certificate wraps the key under import within the TR-34 key block cryptogram. RSA_2048 is the only wrapping key algorithm allowed.
